app.title: CareerBridge
app.subtitle: Free tools to help you find work in your new country
app.footer: Built with ❤️ to help job seekers everywhere
app.footerCredit: Job-search methodology from the open-source project

home.heroSub: Simple, free AI tools designed for job seekers in a new country. No account needed — your privacy matters.
home.privacyLine: No account needed • Nothing saved on our servers • Private
home.advancedTeaserBody: Portal search planning, batch evaluation, application tracker, pipeline, outreach, and more — in one place.
home.interviewDesc: Practice answering interview questions with AI feedback using the STAR method
home.cvDesc: Build a professional CV step by step with AI help — optimized for job application systems
home.evaluateDesc: Paste a job description and get a match score, gap analysis, and action plan
home.tipsDesc: Chat with an AI career coach about salary, cover letters, LinkedIn, and more
home.privacyBanner: Chats go through the AI service; the application tracker and your CV edits stay on this device unless you export.

interview.title: Interview Practice
interview.subtitle: Practice with AI using the STAR+R method (Situation, Task, Action, Result, Reflection)
interview.jobPrompt: What type of job are you preparing for?
interview.jobPlaceholder: e.g., Restaurant server, IT support, Warehouse worker...

quickPrompts.challenge: Tell me about a challenge you faced
quickPrompts.teamwork: Describe a time you worked in a team
quickPrompts.project: Walk me through a project you completed
quickPrompts.mistake: Tell me about a mistake you learned from

cv.title: CV / Resume Builder
cv.subtitle: We'll help you build a professional CV step by step
cv.name: Full Name
cv.languagesPlaceholder: Languages (e.g. English — fluent, Dutch — intermediate). Leave empty if not needed.
cv.skillsPlaceholder:
e.g.
Customer service
Microsoft Excel
Teamwork
cv.targetRole: What job are you looking for?
cv.previewHelp: When you came from Job Evaluation, AI suggestions for this role appear in the card above. The dashed box holds coach-only notes (not in your download). Edit the markdown, or use Apply AI suggestions to merge tips from the CV text and job context.
cv.coachNoteHint: Not part of your downloaded CV — for your eyes only.
cv.previewJobEvalHint: From your Job Evaluation — used when generating and when you apply AI suggestions.
cv.regenerateHint: Change answers above, then regenerate — or edit the CV text after it is generated.
cv.uploadHint: Text or Markdown (.txt, .md) up to 512 KB, or PDF up to 3 MB. PDFs are read in your browser with pdf.js (text-based PDFs work best; scanned images need OCR elsewhere). Word: export as PDF or .txt first.
cv.uploadTooLarge: File is too large (max 512 KB for text).
cv.uploadPdfEmpty: No text found in this PDF. It may be scanned images — try a text-based PDF or paste text from another app.
cv.uploadPdfError: Could not read this PDF. Try another export or use .txt / .md.
cv.structurePartialHint: We filled what we could from your file. Check and edit the fields below.
cv.structureFailed: Could not reach AI to refine fields — you can still edit manually.
cv.structureHeuristicOnly: Contact details detected from your file
cv.structureHeuristicOnlyHint: AI did not return structured data. We kept email, phone, or links we found — review and edit the fields below.
cv.openJobEvaluate: Evaluate a job for this profile
cv.openJobEvaluateHint: opens Job Evaluation with your questionnaire answers prefilled (you can edit before analyzing).
cv.jobEvalLoaded: Job evaluation linked to CV Builder
cv.jobEvalContextHint: Keywords and gaps from your evaluation are included when you generate or apply AI suggestions. Dismiss when you are done with this role.
cv.jobEvalMarkdownOnly: Structured tips were not available; your full evaluation is still included in generate / apply prompts.

evaluate.title: Job Evaluation
evaluate.subtitle: Paste a job description (and optionally a posting URL). We'll analyze how well it fits you.
evaluate.jobDescPlaceholder: Paste the full job description here...
evaluate.yourSkillsPlaceholder: Tell us about your skills and experience (a few sentences is fine)...
evaluate.preparingHandoff: Preparing structured tips for CV Builder…
evaluate.structuredPartialHint: You can still open CV Builder — the written evaluation will be used.
evaluate.structuredFailed: Could not load structured tips — try again from Job Evaluation.
evaluate.jobUrlHint: We fetch readable text from many career pages. JavaScript-only or login-only pages may not work — paste the job text above instead.
evaluate.skillsPrefillHint: If you uploaded a CV on CV Builder or used “Evaluate a job for this profile”, this field may be prefilled.
evaluate.urlFetchEmpty: No readable text from that URL. Paste the job description above or try another link.
evaluate.needJobDescOrUrl: Add a job description or a working posting URL.

tips.title: Career Tips
tips.subtitle: Ask our AI career coach anything about finding work
tips.placeholder: Ask a question about your career...

quickPrompts.coverLetter: Help me write a cover letter
quickPrompts.linkedin: How to improve my LinkedIn profile?
quickPrompts.findJobs: How to find jobs in a new country?
quickPrompts.ats: What is ATS and how to pass it?

advanced.title: Advanced tools
advanced.subtitle: The rest of the career-ops playbook in your browser: coaching for scanning, batch review, applications, outreach, research, and more. Heavy automation (Playwright portal scraping, PDF rendering, Go dashboard) still lives in the open-source CLI.
advanced.whyTitle: Why isn’t everything identical to career-ops?
advanced.whyBody: career-ops runs on your computer with Claude Code, Playwright (real browser sessions for listings and PDFs), and a terminal dashboard. This site delivers the same AI workflows without installing tools. Use career-ops on your machine when you want full automation; use CareerBridge when you need a simple web entry point.

quick.batchTemplateMsg:
Here is my background in 3–5 sentences: [paste].

---

Job 1 JD:
[paste]

---

Job 2 JD:
[paste]

---

Job 3 JD:
[paste]

Please give each job a short title, grade A–F, and top 3 strengths or gaps for me.
quick.pipelineTemplateMsg:
I have these roles to process (URLs or titles, one per line):
[paste list]

Help me decide order to tackle them and what to do first for each.
quick.outreachLinkedInMsg: Help me write a short LinkedIn connection note to a recruiter at [company]. I am interested in [role type]. Keep it under 300 characters, warm and professional.

scan.title: Job & portal scan coach
scan.desc: Plan where and how to look (company sites, Ashby, Greenhouse, Lever, boards). The CLI can auto-scan; here the AI helps you build habits and target lists.
scan.placeholder: Ask how to find openings at a company, which boards to check, or how to set up a weekly search routine...

batch.title: Batch job evaluation
batch.desc: Evaluate several postings in one go. Paste your background, then each job separated by a line containing only ---.
batch.placeholder: Paste your background, then each job description separated by ---

tracker.title: Application tracker
tracker.desc: Track companies, roles, and status in a simple table. Stored only in this browser (export CSV anytime).

pipeline.title: Pipeline & pending URLs
pipeline.desc: Turn a backlog of links or titles into a clear order of attack and next actions—like career-ops pipeline mode, coach-only in the browser.
pipeline.placeholder: Paste URLs or job lines you have not applied to yet. Ask how to prioritize and what to do next...

apply.title: Application form coach
apply.desc: Help answering long-form application questions, choosing examples, and keeping a consistent story—aligned with career-ops apply mode.
apply.placeholder: Paste an application question or describe the form section you are stuck on...

outreach.title: Outreach & LinkedIn messages
outreach.desc: Draft short, respectful outreach (LinkedIn, email, follow-ups) inspired by career-ops contacto mode.
outreach.placeholder: Who are you writing to, and what role or company? Paste any draft you have...

deep.title: Deep company research
deep.desc: Structured research on culture, product, interview style, and public signals—like career-ops deep mode (web-grounded answers depend on what you paste).
deep.placeholder: Name the company and paste links or snippets you already found, or ask what to look for...

training.title: Course & certificate check
training.desc: Decide if a course, bootcamp, or cert is worth your time for your target roles—career-ops training mode, simplified.
training.placeholder: Paste the course or certificate details and your career goal...

project.title: Portfolio project review
project.desc: Stress-test a side project or portfolio piece for interviews—career-ops project mode framing.
project.placeholder: Describe your project, stack, and what role you are targeting...

tracker.storageNote: Data stays in your browser only. Clearing site data removes it.
tracker.empty: No applications yet. Add a row to start tracking.
tracker.importCsvInvalid: Could not read that CSV. Check the format matches export.
tracker.importReplaceConfirm: Replace all current rows with the file? OK = replace, Cancel = add to existing rows.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: That link doesn’t exist or was moved.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
common.creditsExhausted: AI credits used up. Please try again later.
